title: adelia brandegeei
intro: Adelia brandegeei, also known as the prickly chaff flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Adelia brandegeei is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including wounds, eczema, and arthritis.
